title: hordeum × blomii
intro: Hordeum × blomii, also known as Korean sprouted barley, is a type of barley crop that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects due to the presence of bioactive compounds such as polyphenols and saponins. The health benefits of Hordeum × blomii include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as aiding in digestion and reducing oxidative stress. Hordeum × blomii can be prepared as herbal tea, powder, or capsule, and is often consumed as a supplement or used as an ingredient in functional foods.
